changes.description: Added getStorageUsage(), runCleanup(retentionDays, quotaBytes, nowMs), deleteExpiredBlobs(), and evictToQuota() methods. Cleanup deletes uploaded blobs past retention period, enforces quota via LRU eviction of oldest uploaded blobs, respects multi-identity retention (never deletes blobs with pending/uploading references).
Added nostling:media:cleanup IPC handler for manual cleanup trigger with configurable retentionDays and quotaBytes. Added nostling:media:storage-usage IPC handler.

tests_added: src/main/blob-storage/BlobStorageService.test.ts: +13 tests covering getStorageUsage, expired blob deletion, retention period, multi-identity retention, quota LRU eviction, pending blob protection, boundary conditions, orphaned blobs, uploading status protection, same-identity multi-message retention

results.question: Edge case test coverage
results.note: Remediated: added 4 edge case tests (boundary, orphan, uploading status, same-identity multi-message)
